block_00: What is the best trading method?
block_01: There is no “one strategy fits all” when it comes to trading. However, some approaches are more popular than others because of the simplicity in understanding them and their clear mechanics.
block_02: In our review of the 3 most popular approaches, we explain how they work, cover the pros and cons and reveal what type of analysis is normally used for each of them. And if you are unsure of which one is better for you, you may try them all on your Practice balance!
block_03: Read on to find out about the 3 most popular Forex approaches.
